query:
SELECT id, chaveJ, nomeAgente, empresa FROM certificacoes WHERE chaveJ LIKE '%726228%' OR chaveJ LIKE '%JJ726%';
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM certificacoes;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user axRHbWZqKReZrAb.b2cf85c9ad94 --database SMgJn6AGQCNfDq7mPzPqc9 --execute SELECT id, chaveJ, nomeAgente, empresa FROM certificacoes WHERE chaveJ LIKE '%726228%' OR chaveJ LIKE '%JJ726%';
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM certificacoes;
